hero.lede: Hong Kong's Pokémon trading board — designed for collectors who want real trades, face to face.

districts.label: HK Districts
districts.sub: Every listing tagged by district. No shipping, no couriers.

bilingual.label: Bilingual day one
bilingual.sub: Every string flips — including the tab bar.

launch.label: Beta launch
launch.sub: Hong Kong collectors get early access. Apply below.

features.title: Built for how Hong Kong actually trades.

pairs.title: Every post is a pair.
pairs.body: Forcing a 'want' surfaces liquidity a one-sided feed can't see.

pricing.title: Both sides see the same number.
pricing.body: Raw and graded prices auto-pulled in HKD, refreshed daily. No haggling on made-up numbers.

district.title: Sha Tin Saturday 2pm.
district.body: Every listing tagged with one of 18 HK districts. Cantonese-first. In-person only by design.

waitlist.title: Be there on launch day.
waitlist.body: A small group of Hong Kong collectors, selected from the waitlist, get early access. First-come, first-served.
waitlist.micro: No spam. One email when we open. Unsubscribe whenever.

notFound.lede: This page isn't in the binder.
